text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Did you see the girl who took first?!<n>Mmm-mmm!
The way she gleamed<n>when she crossed the
finish line!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
choice_data_list: Next time, I want you taking first!
Next time, I want you taking first!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
choice_data_list: Next time, I want you taking first!
Next time, I want you taking first!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But whatever I achieved is thanks to<n>the
Umamusume! They're the reason<n>why I push
myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Like the ones I ran with today. They<n>made me so
emotional! Like, did you<n>see—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, she goes on telling me how<n>charming the
other racers were today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I guess I didn't have the heart to be<n>first today...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I need to get my act together and<n>work harder to
do my oshis proud!
